name: CI Quality Gate Improvement
description: Systematically improve test coverage, reduce lint warnings, and improve overall code quality metrics.

constraints: All existing tests must continue to pass
New tests must be meaningful, not trivial assertions

agent_instructions: You are improving code quality metrics. For coverage: (1) identify uncovered branches/lines using coverage reports, (2) write unit tests for error paths and edge cases, (3) add integration tests for critical flows. For lint: (1) fix unused variables, (2) resolve 'any' type usages, (3) correct style issues. Each trial should add targeted tests or fix lint warnings. Do not write low-value tests just to inflate coverage.
